name: find_residue_around
description: Find the residues around a specific residue

target_residue.description: the chain id and residue index of the target residue. Example: A.100

distance.description: the distance cutoff for finding the surrounding residues

name: find_residue_by_name
description: Find the key of a residue by its name.

name.description: the 3-letter PDB name of the residue

name: find_target_protein_path
description: Determine the path of the target protein, return None if the path cannot be found

desc.description: the natural language description of the target protein

name: summon_next_agent
description: Suggest an optional completion of all tasks of the current agent and an optional summon of the next agent in the workflow.
